positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric design featuring overlapping shapes and single continuous line work. The motif is a stylized mountain range or mountain peak. Style: Mid-century modern design, negative space utilization, limited color palette (terracotta, slate gray, cream), clean vector graphics, highly scalable.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, clutter, gradients, photorealism, messy lines
